name: 💡 RFC Feedback
about: Comments and suggestions on published RFCs
title: "[RFC-XXX] "
labels: rfc-feedback
---

**Which RFC are you commenting on?**
e.g. RFC-001: Trust-Pledge

**Which section?**
Quote the specific section or line you're responding to.

**Your feedback**
Be specific. If you disagree, explain why and (if possible) suggest an alternative.

**Context (optional)**
What's your background? This helps us weight different perspectives — e.g. AI safety researcher, enterprise buyer, agent developer.
